name: figma
description: Turn Figma frames, exports, and screenshots into focused UI implementation loops.

interface.shortDescription: Work from Figma frames and exports
interface.longDescription: Use local Figma-oriented workflows to translate frame screenshots, exports, and design notes into focused frontend implementation passes.
defaultPrompt: Review this Figma frame screenshot and align the current UI to it.
Extract the navigation model from this mockup and implement it.
Compare current UI to this design export and fix the biggest mismatch.
